description_long: This is a tall, industrial-style stool constructed primarily from dark metal, featuring a square seat with high, straight sides and an open bottom. The seat area is box-like, with a cutout section visible from one side, possibly for easier access or a specific functional purpose. The stool stands on four sturdy, straight legs, each reinforced by horizontal crossbars for added stability. One side of the stool displays a prominent vertical support with a ladder-like pattern, suggesting additional structural reinforcement or a design accent. The surface of the stool is matte with visible wear and subtle scratches, giving it a utilitarian, weathered appearance. This stool is suitable for urban environments such as public parks, bus stops, or industrial settings.
description: A tall, boxy metal stool with a square seat, high sides, and sturdy legs, featuring a utilitarian, industrial design with visible wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid square seat with high sides and a vertical support with a ladder-like pattern on the left leg.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the open cutout in the seat and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs and crossbars.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back of the seat and the four straight legs with crossbars.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the prominent vertical support with a ladder-like pattern and the open seat area.
